description_long: This is a classic-style motorcycle with a beige body and chrome accents, featuring a teardrop-shaped fuel tank and a single brown leather seat. The front of the motorcycle is equipped with a large round headlamp, two round mirrors, and orange turn signals. The wheels are spoked with metallic rims and fitted with black rubber tires, while the engine is prominently exposed beneath the tank. The rear section includes a tail light, license plate, and a small rear fender. The motorcycle has a side stand for parking and visible exhaust pipes running along the side. The overall design suggests a retro or vintage aesthetic, likely inspired by mid-20th-century motorcycles.
description: A beige, vintage-style motorcycle with chrome accents, a single brown seat, and spoked wheels. It features a round headlamp, exposed engine, and classic retro design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the round headlamp, two mirrors, and front fender with visible turn signals.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the teardrop fuel tank, brown seat, engine, and side stand.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tail light, license plate, and rear fender.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the exhaust pipes, engine, and full profile of the motorcycle.
